= timestamp





Converts a value to a timestamp

== Parameters

*`default`* &lt;timestamp&gt; (optional) An optional value to yield if the target cannot be parsed as a timestamp.


== Examples

[,bloblang]
----
root.foo = this.ts.timestamp()
root.bar = this.none.timestamp(1234567890.timestamp())
----
